caption: A person opens a dark brown wooden door to reveal a modern living room. In the foreground, the dark wood grain of the door and its silver handle are prominent. As the door swings open, a bright room comes into view, featuring white tiled floors that reflect the overhead lighting. The living area contains a brown leather sofa set against a wall, sitting behind a red patterned area rug. A large window with sheer white curtains and heavier beige drapes lets in natural light. To the right, a black media console holds a television. A white chandelier hangs from the ceiling, illuminating the space. No people are visible in the frames, and there is no on-screen text or logos. The sequence captures the transition from a closed doorway to a fully revealed view of the interior living space.
